title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at VIT University South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at VIT University South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
VIT University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VIT University South Asia Partners:
VIT University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University South Asia Partners!
